user_reviews_extended.Name: The Fantastic Family
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I hate that I am giving this restaurant a bad review. I have always spoke highly of this place until today when the waitress reminded us to leave after paying for our food and giving her tips. I have visited this particular location three times before today and was never aware of the two hour stay. My friend and I decided to meet for dinner since the last time we saw each other in September 2025. Therefore we stopped our order 45 minutes before our 2 hours was up. We couldn’t even finish our meal because we’ve had enough. We were just there catching up and smiling and laughing when the waitress reminded us that our time up and that we had to leave. My friend and I looked at each other in shock. I was waiting for my ride to pick me up when she approached us. The waitress was extremely professional and we don’t blame her for the senseless company policy. She deserves a 5 star. The company rating is a 2 star. There were vacant tables while we were discussing and asked to leave.

We decided to leave the table and wait in the front for my ride. I asked to speak to the manager and we questioned, trying to understand the 2 hour time they are giving customers to stay. We did let them know this is an effective approach to retaining their customers but she kept on saying this is the policy.

I have experienced this in my entire life until today that customers could be asked to leave the restaurant due to some senseless policy. I’ll rather take my business elsewhere.

user_reviews_extended.reply_text_original:
Thank you for your feedback, and we’re sorry this experience left you feeling rushed during a meaningful visit. That’s not the impression we want to leave.

Our two-hour dining limit is a standard policy during busy periods to ensure fair seating for all guests. That said, we understand how frustrating this can feel—especially when tables appear available—and we regret that it disrupted your time. We appreciate you recognizing your server’s professionalism, and your feedback has been shared with our management team so we can improve how this policy is communicated.

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pat S
user_reviews_extended.Description:
K Pot offers both Korean Hot Pot and Korean BBQ. While we had a good time, our service could have been improved. We weren't informed about the sauce bar initially, which we felt could have enhanced the flavor of our initial meat servings. It's a lively place with fast-paced service, offering a dynamic experience for both Hot Pot and Korean BBQ at $35 for an all-you-can-eat experience. The sauce bar offers various sauces, fried shrimp, chicken, and more.
You order using a tablet, and the menu has a wide selection of meats and sides. Among the items we tried were lobster balls, garlic shrimp, hanger steak, and K Pot steak (which could have had better seasoning). However, other dishes like scallops, mushrooms, and white rice were pretty decent. A highlight was the beef bulgogi, definitely a must-try. Overall, it's a place worth giving a shot!

user_reviews_extended.Description: Unfortunately, I had a pretty bad experience at this particular Kpot. The customer service is awful. The server never introduced herself. She nor the food runners bothered to hand to the food to those who ordered it, instead opting to have the guests figure out whose food belonged to who. The entire time I and my party were trying to dine, another employee made it his business to clean around us, creating a general feeling of being unwelcome and a bother. Finally, after feeling unwelcome, another employee closed off the bathroom nearly an entire hour before closing. The manager was entirely dismissive of the bathroom issue. Personally, I will not be back. Spend your money at the location in Seven Corners, VA.

First time here and definitely not the last time at all.
The service was on the money, courteous and promptness was really appreciated.
The food was delivered once I hit "SEND" on the tablet and away we go! I recommend the dinner menu as the lunch offering leaves a lot to be desired.
We chose the BBQ and was not disappointed at all. Our server came over and changed our grill when needed.
One may think the two hours given is not enough, but trust me, it is the perfect amount of time.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vy H.
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Came here for dinner last week—overall everything was great!  You can either get the All-You-Can-Eat Hotpot or BBQ for $29.99 but only pay an extra $5 to have both hotpot and BBQ for $34.99–definitely a better option and a chance to try both!

You order everything via the iPad tablet and the food items get brought to your table fairly quick.  There’s a lot of different meat, seafood, noodles, vegetables, etc. options!  Also, there is a sauce bar where you can make your own dipping sauces, and they have a dessert section and “fried food” bar that has chicken wings, fried shrimp and French fries.

They have a full bar too!  And service was great—our server Eugene was friendly and attentive.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Phoenix doyle
user_reviews_extended.Description: The manager is not professional at all. We went for dinner at 10:30, and left at 11:20. The reason why it took so long is because we had to cook everythingn, but we had food all on our trash plates except for the steak. The steak was fine, but the Bulgolgi, and Prime brisket were not. The Bulgolgi was not good at all. Dry and not marinated very well, and same with the prime brisket… except thats not marinated. The bill was still $89. The manager only took off 15%. And the fact that my girlfriend was paying for dinner tonight is what really set me off. She still had to pay $75 for dinner… a dinner that we weren’t even able to enjoy. We’re very loyal customers that  come to enjoy a meal, but not anymore sonce we had to pay for an almost full priced dinner. Absolutely ridiculous. You lost a customer.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jummy A
user_reviews_extended.Description:
**Update**
Went back in February and they now have their liquor license - the bar is now fully operational.

Love this new location, it’s right where Books-a-million used to be - next to Marshalls and on the same block as LA Fitness all in the middle of The Laurel shopping center.

Pros:
- This is a all you can eat Korean BBQ
- There are multiple food options from beef to seafood - vegetarian and they will have it all
- Everything on the menu is available at dinner time
- Lunchtime menu is cheaper than dinner time
- ordering replenishments from your table via an iPad is the most convenient option I have ever come across in a restaurant
- The Waiters (and even managers) will come around and help you if you do not know how to work the grill or hotpot (especially if you are new to this)

CONS:
- No Takeout, this is a dine-in restaurant only
- You can’t take home your leftovers, so only order what you can finish
- Some dinner items will not be available during Lunchtime so schedule your visit accordingly
- You can have hotpot only but you will pay same rate as BBQ and there’s an up-charge for hotpot even if that’s the only thing you want(I do not mind this because it’s less than $10 plus I also get bbq if I want)

Food and Service is great per usual, they have new dinner items (especially love the lamb)

The bar is still not open(they do not have a liquor license yet. However they have fountain drinks and co)- not sure if they a BYOB policy at this time, call ahead to find out prior to your visit

user_reviews_extended.Name: Flower Meadow
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Update to my first review, I had a disappointing few incidents with my last time dining here and will unfortunately not be returning. There was somehow a hair in my food and something unusual imbedded in one of my quail eggs the waitress determined was "something black". I don't feel comfortable eating here after having this issue and noticing a few things like dishes at the buffet being dirty and servers hanging around the bins with plates and bowls.

They refuse to return my money although I did not get to eat my meal and left shortly after finding a strangers hair in my bowel of soup and I had already taken the first bite. Couldn't eat for 3 days after this. The visit immediately before this the server contaminated my food with tongs that just touched raw meat.... The menu is okay but everything about the experience makes me sick. Still trying to get my money back 2 months later. I have a curly Afro you could imagine the disgust of finding someone's unknown hair in my food...

user_reviews_extended.Description:
Such a cool spot, and a dynamic experience available for both Hot Pot and Korean BBQ. We personally went with just the Hot Pot this time as it was plenty enough for us! But that's really cool that you can have Korean BBQ alongside it for only $5 more!

The quality was superb and the selection vast. The sauce bar was the best I've seen from a Hot Pot venue too, very fresh and elaborate with kimchi and other things available there that you don't typically see.

Thanks for the wonderful service Nixon, you were great! And the staff very efficient when ordering more from the tablet 😃

user_reviews_extended.Name: Juliate Puja Palma
user_reviews_extended.Description: "My inaugural visit to Kpot BBQ in Laurel was delightful. The food was superb, especially their hot soups and seafood offerings. The unlimited chicken fry and French fries were a standout feature. The staff's friendliness and top-notch service added to the overall positive experience. I wholeheartedly recommend it!"

user_reviews_extended.Name: Clayton Lively
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great blend of hot pot and Korean BBQ.  Order through tablet, it's rather convenient not having to wait for your server to come by.  Garlic shrimp was my favorite for the hot pot, lamb for the BBQ.  They do clap and sing for birthdays, FYI.  The place is brand brand new, bar still under construction, not open.  It's delicious though, with a great buffet of sauces and fruit and even french fries.  Super friendly even to a baby in a stroller.

user_reviews_extended.Name: moon yoongi
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I have been to many K-Pots before & I usually go to the Rockville or Catonsville location. But, since this one was a bit closer & brand new, I really wanted to give it a try! But, this is the first time I have ever received bad food & service from ANY restaurant.

I first arrived with my sister around 2:40 & was told there was a 35-45 minute wait which I do not mind waiting at all since I work as a server & am very patient when it comes to eating at restaurants. I get a text at 3:12 stating that our table was ready. We got sat & our server gave us the whole run down. We wanted the lunch special but was told due to the holiday, they were only serving all day dinner. Which we were fine with as well! Afterwards, I went to the sauce bar to make my sauce & noticed that the yum yum sauce was this very pale yellow color. Almost like mayonnaise which was a little weird, since its usually a pale orange color but we brushed it off. I then order 2 plates of beef bulgogi & two bowls of white rice. When I came back to the table, I saw the bulgogi & one bowl of rice. So I anticipated that they would bring the other bowl soon. The portions of meat were VERY small for the price we were paying. I counted 3 pieces of meat even though we were paying for the dinner menu, where usually the portions are a lot bigger. I place the food on the grill & noticed that the grill was never turned on. The server was attentive to all the other customers around but we were ignored. 8 minutes later, she finally comes up to us to ask us if we are ok & I say "i"m so sorry but I don't think the grill is on." She then grabs the grill, turns it on, & just walks off. Doesn't even apologize or anything. I always try to give people the benefit of the doubt since I understand how tough food service is, so I brushed it off. I cooked the food & the two plates that usually can feed the both of us, only fed one of us.

10 minutes go by & I still did not receive the other bowl of rice. I noticed the food runners bringing all the other tables their rice, but we had been waiting for a while for it. I figured that they may have forgotten, so I just placed another order of meat & rice & thought that maybe they would bring it then. The grill needed to be changed, so we waited again. 6 minutes later, we received the order of meat but once again, no rice! I try to ask the food runner, but they just walked off. At this point, I was beginning to feel upset. Our server continued to assist others. She would look at our table, but did not check up on us one time. I was able to ask the busser for the manager & I let the manager know what was going on. He told us he was going to check in with the server & see what was going on. He returns & tells us that there is a wait on rice & that it should be in a few minutes. He let us know that if we wanted to stay, that the rice should be out soon. But if not, we can leave. We understand that there can be a wait for things, but never once did our server communicate that with us. While he said that, I continued to see more food runners with rice on their carts. At this point, my sister & I just wanted to leave. We let him know that we were leaving & he apologized which was kind. As we grab our stuff, our server came back to our table & asked "are you guys ok?" in a very passive aggressive tone.  As someone who works in the food industry, this was truly the WORST experience I've ever had. I will continue to go to Rockville & Catonsville. I don't plan on coming back here. I hate that I had to have such a bad experience at a restaurant I usually enjoy. :(

At this point, I was beginning to feel upset. Our server continued to assist others. She would look at our table, but did not check up on us one time. I was able to ask the busser for the manager & I let the manager know what was going on. He told us he was going to check in with the server & see what was going on. He returns & tells us that there is a wait on rice & that it should be in a few minutes. He let us know that if we wanted to stay, that the rice should be out soon. But if not, we can leave. We understand that there can be a wait for things, but never once did our server communicate that with us. While he said that, I continued to see more food runners with rice on their carts. At this point, my sister & I just wanted to leave. We let him know that we were leaving & he apologized which was kind. As we grab our stuff, our server came back to our table & asked "are you guys ok?" in a very passive aggressive tone.  As someone who works in the food industry, this was truly the WORST experience I've ever had. I will continue to go to Rockville & Catonsville. I don't plan on coming back here. I hate that I had to have such a bad experience at a restaurant I usually enjoy. :(
user_reviews_extended.reply_text_original:
Hello Moon Yoongi,

It makes us sad when we hear about experiences such as yours. Our main goal is to share engaging experiences with our patrons and the
incredible food that we offer at our restaurant.

We are as passionate about our food as we are to serve it to you and greatly appreciate your
feedback. If you grant us the opportunity, we'd love to make this right and earn back your business.

At your convenience, please email marketing@thekpot.com and we will take immediate
action to make this right.

- The KPOT Team

title: Shah’s Halal Food
address: 14605 Baltimore Ave unit B, Laurel, MD 20707

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dontlivebackwards
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I had a party yesterday for about 12 guests and Shah’s Halal was amazing! I placed a large order right before the party and they had it ready within an hour — super fast and friendly service.

The food was fantastic — we got chicken, lamb, rice, salad, and all the sauces. Everything was fresh, flavorful, and the portions were very generous. Our guests loved it! The meats were tender, the rice was perfectly cooked, and the salad was crisp.

Highly recommend Shah’s Halal for catering or large orders. Great experience from start to finish. I’ll definitely be ordering again!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Salahuddin Tariq
user_reviews_extended.Description:
DO NOT BUY ! Continue if you want to know more.

It is shocking that how the google review is so high for this place. It is such a labor to select a place that sells good quality and "actual halal" food in US. One thing that I want to emphasize is that you need to improve the quality of your food and ingredients. For example, the hummus that you sent me was not really a hummus..it was some liquidy mix and mash of i do not what !! Such a low quality and bad tasting one. Plus pita bread was so hard and cheap quality as well. If you can't sell a good quality n organic hummus at low price then you better increase the price but do not compromise on the taste and the quality and same for the pita breads. As far as the chicken burger and shawarma, they were also not tasty as well. Just horrible. No good combination of spices or anything. Overall I will say, if their food is cheap and so is the quality. Won't buy again. Waste of money n time !

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jo C
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sha’s Halal Food lamb platter is a flavorful and satisfying meal that delivers the perfect balance of tender meat, aromatic rice, and fresh toppings. The lamb is juicy and well-seasoned, offering a smoky taste when taking a bite. Served with fresh lettuce and ripe tomatoes to add a refreshing contrast, bringing a light crunch to every bite. The white sauce is creamy and tangy, generously drizzled over the platter to elevate the overall taste. A touch of their spicy red sauce adds the perfect amount of heat, making each bite exciting. The portion size is generous, ensuring a filling meal that’s great for lunch or dinner. The customer service was well, making you feel welcomed, engaging genuine conversation to feel great.

user_reviews_extended.Name: naveed tahir
user_reviews_extended.Description:
If you're looking for an authentic taste of Pakistan with a halal guarantee, this restaurant is the place to go! The menu is a celebration of rich and flavorful Pakistani cuisine, featuring classics  kebabs, and burgers The spices are perfectly balanced, giving every dish a unique depth of flavor without overpowering the senses.

The staff is friendly (Ryan) and attentive, always ready to make recommendations if you're unsure what to try. The portions are generous, making it ideal for sharing a meal with family and friends.

Whether you're familiar with Pakistani cuisine or trying it for the first time, this restaurant offers a culinary journey that will leave you wanting more. Don't miss their signature desserts like chapli kabab

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ethan Mitkowski
user_reviews_extended.Description: Left New York 2 years ago and could not find authentic street cart halal, until today. The key is in the chicken, flavorful but also with a hefty punch of spice which Shah’s does an amazing job of accomplishing. I ordered a combo so i can also vouch for the amazingly done lamb as well & the perfect rice. They also have a wide array of toppings from peppers to cucumbers to just your standard lettuce and tomato, all beautifully fresh.  Not only is it an amazing meal but the fellas serving it are incredibly kind & conversational. 100% my new regular spot and i would recommend making it yours too.

title: Wingstop
description: Casual counter-serve chain serving a variety of chicken wings & sides.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Melodic Kalimba
user_reviews_extended.Description: I got 35 wings, 5 boneless. I got the hot honey, garlic Parmesan, bbq flavors. The wings were meaty and delicious. Why the atmosphere lacks, the coworkers were friendly and quick. The fries and ranch also hit the spot. Would go again.
user_reviews_extended.text_original: I got 35 wings, 5 boneless. I got the hot honey, garlic Parmesan, bbq flavors. The wings were meaty and delicious. Why the atmosphere lacks, the coworkers were friendly and quick. The fries and ranch also hit the spot. Would go again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathryn Silverman
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love these wings but the service here is so crazy bad. I usually order online and give myself way more time than the email says to get here. Today the email said 21-26 minutes I came 35 minutes after the order was placed and the woman up front said it was being made. 10 minutes later still no food I asked another employee and she said she didn't see my ticket so I called the other woman from the back who told me it was cooking and she said she actually never saw my ticket she just told me she had, so she looked up my number and said the order was received but the ticket never printed. So my food is now being started 45 minutes after I placed my order with chicken that had just been sitting there. Got my order 49 minutes after ordering middle of the day only a couple other customers there.

user_reviews_extended.Name: thuyvy nguyen
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I am extremely disappointed with my experience at this Wingstop. I placed my order online over 40 minutes ahead of time specifically so my food would be ready when I arrived. When I got there, none of my food had even been made. They didn't even realize there was an order under my name until they looked it up in the system.
The employee then asked all of the workers if they knew about my order, and every single one said no.
That is completely unacceptable. What is the point of offering online ordering if no one is checking to make sure the orders are actually fulfilled?
This was a total waste of my time, and I will not be coming back here again.

Where is the health department?  This place should be shut down.

user_reviews_extended.Name: C M
user_reviews_extended.Description: WORST wingstop ever. Save your money coming here and head to americas best wings instead honestly. You can’t order a combo meal online anymore.. instead you have to buy everything separately and calling in to place an order is practically useless cause they direct you to order online once again. I’m calling because I want human interaction or I’d simply go online?? And that’s IF you finally get your food, expect them to NOT follow any instructions on your order whatsoever. Well done? Extra anything? Any allergies? Forget it. I paid extra for more ranch, least they could do is fill it up to the top as it should be but nope, I bought two extra sides of ranch completely empty. I never usually give reviews like this but this wingstop has failed MANY times and it’s disappointing. They need either new management, employees or a complete change of everything. Wish there was another wingstop closer to me with better service/quality cause this one in laurel isn’t it. Sucks I won’t be coming here anymore but oh well, I’ll take my money elsewhere 🤷🏻‍♀️

I won’t be returning.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bryan Darbouze
user_reviews_extended.Description:
From the look on that young, thin lady with braid’s face and the taste of the fries that was supposed to be seasoned w lemon pepper, I and everyone else could tell that everybody in this location was either drunk, high or both. Watched a boy w a drink set that drink aside to the right of the machine and asked for a cup w his order, and thus swindling another extra drink from the high young lady w braids.

This place is a mess. The order was supposed to be cooked well and it came back barely cooked.

Don’t waste ya money, go to the next wingstop or shoot anywhere else

user_reviews_extended.Name: MC AK
user_reviews_extended.Description: This was my first time eating here and it was terrible, I waited about 25 mins for someone to take my order in store, There were only 3 people working and mostly they were just doing online orders and ignoring the walk In customers. Didn’t even bother to asks if we were helped already. Til I spoke up. I feel like this is the business owner fault they need more staff, wingstop is a very popular place to only have 3 people working that’s just sad ! Plus the place to eat in is awful they have no one cleaning the tables, no napkins, not even a trash bin like wow A restaurant without a trash bin. The bathrooms were disgusting like they haven’t been clean for a whole year. Tbh I’m never going back there again. Now the food the fries was so salty I couldn’t even eat it. The blue cheese Was tasting like it had stink bugs in it, and the ranch was so watery. everything in that place was terrible. I recommend people to stop going there and try Pizza Boli Chicken wings they are way more better trust me. I just hope the owner takes action if not the state Inspection Should go check that place out it’s not a safe place for people to eat it’s not even sanitized or clean.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lilianne Biama
user_reviews_extended.Description:
ABSOLUTE TRASH!!!
This is the worst wingstop location in the history of locations, you can tell the staff as a whole here doesn’t care and that means the location just needs to be dismantled as a whole.

I came here about a month ago. The cashier made a mistake on my food. He wrang up boneless instead of bone-in. Immediately brought the food back. He let me keep the food and let me know to give the kitchen 10-15 mins and he’ll make a new set of wing (24 count), being 30 plus dollars. We were picking off the boneless as we waited.

You would think okay good customer service it ended there. I guess the kitchen had a difference of opinion because when we return to pick up the food. One of the cooks immediately took our bag without speaking to us. Opened the food laughed and made remarks to coworkers about how it was eaten then proceeded to THROW OUR FOOD AWAY and told us the order CANNOT BE REMADE NOR REFUNDED!! unfinished food and refusal to make what the customer paid for is the craziest thing I’ve seen at this type of restaurant

Long story short the situation escalated, The general manager who wasn’t in the store hung up the phone. The staff refused to make the food as the cashier admitted fault and even offer to pay for the food PERSONALLY!!!!
They ended up calling the police and gave the officer A FAKE CORPORATE NUMBER!!

The GM doesn’t care, the staff has no structure and in the end. They feel as if they can continue on with this quality or service. Things will definitely escalate with this location. If corporate doesn’t make necessary cuts.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Damien Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: Id leave 0 starts if I could. Was decent a few years ago with no real issues. Now the service is abysmal and the wait times are extended. I placed an online order for literally just regular fries and ranch a few days ago.  Wasn’t greeted upon entering and stood their like the invisible man because I have emotional control and wasn’t in a rush. 15 minutes later “we’re just now making orders” okay so why wasn’t the back up communicated when I first entered. Legit waited ONE HOUR for some fries and when I decided to eat when I got home these folks put blue cheese in my bag when I specifically asked before leaving the store “it’s ranch in the bag?” SMFH. Complained to customer service and they sent me a gift card for the price of my order. Order two days later with the gift card and intentionally pulled up like 10-12 minutes after the order was supposed to be done. Still stood there and waited for a few minutes, get home and the fries are SALTY AF. Over it, I like Wingstop on occasion but this location will never see a dime a from me again.. Legit kick rocks with the incompetence and poor service. Don’t even bother. The terrible reviews are accurate.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Camile Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Hi! My name is Camille and I wanted to write about my experience at this particular wing stop. When I entered the establishment around 3pm I was greeted warmly by a young lady at the front counter. She took my order, swiftly with kindness and attention to detail and even gave me recommendations for a few new sauces that the restaurant offered. The young lady that was making the food smiled at me and the other young lady who was assisting with bagging handed me my cup for my drink nicely as well. I say all of this to say, so often we are in a rush, not thinking about the next person on a day to day basis or what they might be going through. However, these young ladies gave me examples of salubrious, intentional and positive experiences in the work place. Management needs to know how well these young women treat their customers.
Very kind, warm and respectful
Kudos to you three!!!! I did not get their names.

Blessings.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mich Monk
user_reviews_extended.Description: All I bought was a single serving of fries - That would have been a 4 star. The customer service however, was so abysmal that I would put it in the negatives. When there are a plethora of eating establishments in the area, and where the products aren't unique, what can stand out is the customer service experience. In this case, I wondered if it is lack of training or management's priority to fill positions with live bodies and not much else? In case it bears highlighting, a customer's experience can start prior to opening the door, but especially once they have entered the premises. In this case, the bar was low and sunk lower from lack of acknowledgment in a timely manner that I was there to the end of the transaction when my food is placed on the counter with no "here's your order," or "thank you for coming," or "do you need anything else." And when I held up the bag and asked, "My fries?" I get a dead-eyed look, no utterance from the person's mouth, and she turned her back and went on her way. So, let me suggest to management that you have secret shoppers go into that place on various days, at various times, if you want to test my experience. When a waiting customer says, "It's always like this", I had to wonder why are customers giving away their agency to shop in unfriendly places for food that is neither unique or high quality. Cause this was my first and last time supporting this establishment.

user_reviews_extended.Name: D nick
user_reviews_extended.Description: So one thing I cant stand is not great customer service. My issue is why would you take my order over the phone while I am taking my lunch break which I do not have a lot of time during my lunch break which is only 30 minutes. I called before so my order could be finish by time I picked it up, they said it would be 20 minutes so I waited until 20 minutes past by to leave my job and go pick it up. When I got to location I had found out that they did even start on my order because the new guy forgot to hit a button to send it back to the cook. So that means I had to wait another 15 minutes due to the lack of training of a new employee that probably shouldn't be answering the phones in the first place until properly trained. Then they made me another batch which took 15 minutes and the same new guy gave the wrong food order to someone else which was mines. So he messed up my order twice less than 1 hour which now im pissed off because its not hard to work in the food industry you just have to good memory or they could put him in the back to make food or shadow someone so he can be trained properly. Which now for the 3rd mistake I have to wait another 20 minutes to get another batch of food which once when I got was not satisfied with the customer service and they didn't try to do anything for my inconvenience  on their behalf so now they have definitely lost a customer. RICK ROSS YOU NEED TO STOP HIRING YOUNG PEOPLE WHO CANT BE ORGANIZED OR KEEP UP WITH THE WORK OR GIVE JUST SIMPLE GOOD CUSTOMER SERVICE. this location is definitely a NO for me !!!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maria Loor
user_reviews_extended.Description:
For the price of the food and the over 40 minute wait, don’t bother. They got our order wrong and when going back to the cashier to let her know she went back to speak to someone who said, “well they’re just going to have to wait.” The cashier then came back and spoke to 6 different customers without saying a word to me. I finally asked what was going on and with an attitude she told me they were remaking the wings and making the other item they forgot to make.
The wings were okay, Ledos makes better wings. They were also very small wings for the price they charged. The fries were tasteless and cold. The location was dirty and worst of all they did not have a trash can inside. We had to throw our trash outside the store in the overflowing trash can that was probably owned by the strip mall. Very disappointed in the overall experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: allgasnobreaks
user_reviews_extended.Description:
4/6/2024
If I could give zero stars I would. Went in here to pick up an order and the short latina lady told me to wait 6 more minutes for the order, so I sat down waited. 10 mins roll by and still nothing. After 15 minutes I decided to get up and see what was taking so long. They now tell me someone else picked up MY order. They say they would not remake it and I would have to contact Uber. Absolutely insane. If the order was already picked up by someone else to begin with, why lie to me and waste my time for 20 minutes when all you had to do is check if you guys had the order or not, takes less than 2 seconds to do that, but these workers have the brains of a bird.

edit: forgot to add the gentleman working the front counter was very understanding of the situation. Everyone else didn't seem like they even cared.

user_reviews_extended.Name: J C
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is the worst wingstop location in the area. There are a bunch of kids playing in the kitchen and an older woman that just has a nasty attitude and disposition. She walked with a limp a little bit and she was rude to me picking up my order. The kids are back there with headphones on, no hair nets, and playing around in the food. I am 6 months pregnant and was really craving this place just for them to give me fry crumbs with burnt corn pieces in them. It was a 0/10. If you see this location do you and your pockets a favor and just drive by it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tee N
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I ordered the 30 pc meal. I also added bread rolls and brownies. I went in after an hour. The website said it’d take max. 45 minutes. My meal wasn’t ready so I asked to pick up my brownies because they tend to forget extras. They said they weren’t sure how long my order would take but that there was a 2-hour wait. So, I gave them another hour. When I finally picked up my meal, the chicken was cold and dry, the meal was missing the veggie sticks and the bread rolls. I’m thankful that I picked up the brownies even though they were stale.

Also, there seemed to be a whole lot of staff drama behind the counter. One of the employees yelled that he was done when a customer asked him a question. So there was a large group of customers waiting and a number of employees in visible view arguing, laughing, and mostly ignoring customers.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kimberly Martin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I placed an online order last night for 15 wings (10 old bay, 5 garlic Parmesan) and a large seasoned fry. The fries were beyond cold and the wings were fried so hard you couldn’t determine flavor wise which was which. We attempted to reach the shop and the phone rang continuously just as it did when we attempted to call in the order. I returned to the shop today with the food for a refund and the young lady working the register after an exchange with another young lady that was making wings in the back advised I would have had to return the food last night because they are not the night shift.  Are you kidding me? You took the food back but you are not able to issue a refund because it was an online order and it didn’t happen on your shift. I explained again that I was not pleased with the food I received and thus I am returning it and would like to be refunded. I was then instructed to provide my order number and contact number to be given to the store owner because that is the only person who can refund online orders. I also asked if the owner can reach out to me regarding this incident and the young lady advised me she can ask her but no guarantee. I will definitely not be returning and expect to be contacted regard this incident.

user_reviews_extended.Name: S Moore
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I must say that these were some of the best wings that I've recently had. I love how the online ordering let's you customize your order. The fried corn is DELICIOUS. And offering Simply Lemonade as a drink option is the icing on the cake.

Update: The quality of the food has become very hit or miss. The last few times I ate here, the chicken was dry and over cooked. The wings and thighs tasted very stale. Even the sauce couldn't cover up the tough, chewy meat. That's unfortunate because I was really liking this place last year. 🙄

user_reviews_extended.Description: First off I spend ALOT of money  here. Today was terrible. Also to see they  do not wear their mask when customers are in the store!! The entire crew there was different. Wing stop really needs the other crew in the restaurant. I ordered 30 wings well done. I called and the female manager with the very long blond hair lied and said it wasn't on her screen. Thank the Lord I had my receipt. Such a rude person. She said "first of all it's gonna take 25 mins" NOT an apology that I have to drive back to the restaurant. When I came back in the cook brought me a large order of fries which tells me someone else had a messed up order. Only one person was behind the counter unlike the other crew. This person snatched my bag and reimbursed my money without saying one word. I will not be back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mr_InTheBlack
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'm usually not this person   I don't do reviews because I typically take each encounter as a 1 off and go about my business.  But today ...  SMH.  I placed an order online for wings.  I showed up 20 minutes after the "ready time".  There are literally 5 employees behind the counter.  Only one of them actually "working".  The other 4 standing around gossiping.  I stood there for almost 5 minutes, with no one addressing me.  Asking me if I could be helped.  NOTHING!  Finally I raise my voice to get someone's attention, and say "I'm here to pick up an order".  One woman that appeared to be working asks one of the gossipers to help me to which she rolls her eyes to find my order.  I watch as she put my food in a bag and then goes on to gossip for for another minute or 2 before she finally hands it to me.  Only to get home and not have a complete order.  This location is usually bad, but today they were outright just TERRIBLE.  I've worked in the food industry and customer service.  I know what it's like.  But the customer experience, talk less of the customer service was beyond unacceptable.  I wanted to find the name and number for the franchisee to let them know that if they want return business that they need to make some drastic changes to staffing.  If I could give this place rating 0 stars I would.  I don't know if anyone else will see this.  I just hope whoever does see it, that it saves themselves some headache.  I live literally 5 minutes drive away, and I will never be going back to this location again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eze Jones
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My experiences with this wing stop location have been less than favorable. My concern is that it's not the food, the wings are fantastic and I love their fries. The problem here is the staff. The staff here seems bothered that customers actually come in to the establishment.  The first time I visited
there were totally different people and they were really nice and very customer service oriented. One of the young ladies mentioned she worked at another location previously and was telling how well the business was doing.  I was initially happy to see another option in the area for wings because one place my family visited often had just closed down.  Well about my third visit, it seems they have gotten some new employees who just don't seem to be the right fit for the job.  At first I thought well maybe they had a rough day but by my sixth visit and with 3 of the last visits with the same dude with his "what do you want" attitude not to mention he can barely open his mouth to answer a question. I really was not looking forward to interacting with him anyway so  last night  I went in at about 10:15 ( keep in mind they close at 11) and the young lady quickly greeted me as I walked through the door, so I was thinking, " yes, I don't have to deal with mean guy".  However, the young lady that took my order, I barely understood any of her questions, it was like she was the "speedy order taker". At the end she asked me if I wanted to dine in or if it was carry out, I began to say dine in and her eyes got so big they almost looked like they were going to roll right out of her head so I felt like I was imposing and  I should just say "carry out" so I did. Right after my order, she punched out and walked out the door. At that moment, I knew why she was in such a rush. Therefore, I won't go where I'm not wanted so I guess I will try the next new spot Hurricane Grill and Wings.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lovepreet Aujla
user_reviews_extended.Description:
UPDATE February 2020
Wingstop quality has gone down since it initially opened. The staff isn't all that helpful and the wings are never piping hot or fresh. They're prepared poorly and I've been back twice hoping to give it another chance. I was let down both times. I won't be returning to Wingstop.
--------------------
Wingstop has delicious, freshly prepared wings. The place itself is definitely meant for carry out; the atmosphere isn't that inviting at all.

You can order ahead online or over the phone (which I would recommend because preparation times can be somewhat long). The wings are pricier than I'd like, considering you can sit at a full service restaurant and get similar quantities for the same price.

Still, Wingstop is a good place to carry out from. Be sure to check for their online deals!

user_reviews_extended.Description: This was my first experience at any wing stop location and sadly i wasn’t impressed i was excited to eat from here just from hearing many good things . I went into this location today and i ordered the 6 piece combo . Louisiana rub & what was supposed to be Hot Buffalo Wings & let me say NOTHING IS SPICY ABOUT THIS FOOD . the fries were very soggy & undercooked & the cheese sauce was sweet which i paid $1 and i asked for hot sauce to give the cheese some flavor & the fries and they asked me to pay $1 again & honestly at that point i was very upset & confused but i proceeded to eat my wings ONLY . so i let the manager on duty know about my situation and asked to be reimbursed because i wasn’t able to stay & wait for fries i had to report back to work . The manager on duty was very unsure on how to give me a refund & from there i knew there was a huge lack of training this chain will not succeed if they do not train there staff properly& efficiently to take care of guest needs properly

Then he lifted a drain cover off floor, reached for a pipe on the floor lost grip twice then connected pipe to drain fryer across the walkway. His hands were covered with dirty fryer grease and dirt. Then he without washing or wiping hands grabbed a sauce mixing bowl, drop it on floor,  picked it up added wings and tossed them poured them into a serving container. Never wiping or washing hands, bowl nothing. Grabbed another order ticket and continued on. The dining/drink serving area was wet and dirty.  Since the other 2 employees witnessed this it must be common practice so wasn't worth my time to correct or berate  them much less asked for my money back. I can't tell ya how the wings were cuz I tossed them.

user_reviews_extended.Description: I have no idea why this place has such a low score on here, I guess people will find anything to complain about. Idc how high the traffic flow is for them , they need to get more staff or just let the Spanish folks take over . Don’t even waste ya time .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fabiola Joseph
user_reviews_extended.Description: Horrible customer service. I ordered my food at 3:58pm when there was not many people, didn’t get the food until 3:50pm. The soda machine was broken. If they knew the soda machine wasn’t working, why did they let me order. The only alternative was Powerade. The workers was clueless when I asked for a refund on the drink. Even McDonald got two fountains. It was  giving stupid

user_reviews_extended.Name: Antoine Davis
user_reviews_extended.Description: Im going to start off and say the wait was a little long for average food. But for the most part the lemon pepper wings where good the garlic parmesan where not tasted like they just put parmesan on them that was it no seasoning fries where ok but tasted like they sat in the bag before the chicken was ready. Note I only live 8 mins from the place. Just an overall 2.7 gave them 3 but there just average to me.
